LinuxDefaultEnvVariables.DefaultKeepList: COLORS, DISPLAY, HOSTNAME, HISTSIZE, KDEDIR, LS_COLORS, MAIL, PS1, PS2, QTDIR, USERNAME, LANG, LC_ADDRESS, LC_CTYPE, LC_COLLATE, LC_IDENTIFICATION, LC_MEASUREMENT, LC_MESSAGES, LC_MONETARY, LC_NAME, LC_NUMERIC, LC_PAPER, LC_TELEPHONE, LC_TIME, LC_ALL, LANGUAGE, LINGUAS, _XKB_CHARSET, XAUTHORITY, TEMP
LinuxDefaultEnvVariables.DefaultDeleteList: IFS, CDPATH, LOCALDOMAIN, RES_OPTIONS, HOSTALIASES, NLSPATH, PATH_LOCALE, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, TERMINFO, TERMINFO_DIRS, TERMPATH, TERMCAP, ENV, BASH_ENV, PS4, GLOBIGNORE, SHELLOPTS, JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS, PERLIO_DEBUG, PERLLIB, PERL5LIB, PERL5OPT, PERL5DBFPATH, NULLCMD, READNULLCMD, ZDOTDIR, TMPPREFIX, PYTHONHOME, PYTHONPATH, PYTHONINSPECT, RUBYLIB, RUBYOPT

Policy.name: Installed by: netSkope, Inc. (24W52P9M7W) Trusted Publisher

GUI.Dialog:

Publisher <$VF_PUBLISHER>
Version <$VF_BUNDLE_VERSION>

EPM is redirecting you for further authentication to confirm elevation

Bloomberg EPM Elevation
Description <$VF_FILE_NAME>
Bundle <$VF_BUNDLE_NAME>
Publisher <$VF_PUBLISHER>
EPM is redirecting you for further step-up authentication
Write your message here.
Your System Administrator collects information about use of applications requiring administrative privileges. Please provide your justification for using this application and click "OK". Your explanation will be sent to the System Administrator.
I need application <$VF_FILE_DESCRIPTION> (<$VF_FILE_NAME>)
Option 2
Option 3
Option 4
Option 5
Enter justification:
Confirm privileges elevation
Authorized user <$VF_USER>
Password
EPM is redirecting you for further authentication to confirm elevation

Restart Computer
Restart Computer
 
Your computer must be restarted to complete the CyberArk EPM Agent upgrade. Before clicking on the "Restart Now" button be sure to save all your work. Note: Until the computer is restarted, some components will not run correctly.
Remind me in:
